steps.t: White Stag prints may be found somewhere in the Drúadan Forest. You should search the forest for White Stag prints.
Lhôs-uksa-Wôt can be found near the White Stag prints. You should speak with Lhôs-uksa-Wôt.
The White Stag can be found somewhere in the Drúadan Forest. You should follow the trail of hoofprints to find the White Stag.
Lhôs-uksa-Wôt can be found near the White Stag. You should speak with Lhôs-uksa-Wôt.
The White Stag can be found in the Drúadan Forest. You should approach the White Stag.
